title: ornithogalum conicum subsp. strictum
intro: Ornithogalum conicum subsp. strictum, also known as the star of Bethlehem, is a flowering plant species within the Asparagaceae family. It is used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, making it a potential treatment for various health issues. The health benefits of Ornithogalum conicum subsp. strictum include its ability to aid in wound healing, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory problems. The plant can be prepared as an infusion or tincture, allowing for its herbal properties to be utilized in a variety of herbal preparations.
